documentTypes.title: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
documentTypes.description: A mutual non-disclosure agreement covering the use, protection, and return of confidential information exchanged between two parties.

fields.label: Purpose
fields.guidance: Why the parties are exchanging confidential information.
fields.default: Evaluating whether to enter into a business relationship with the other party.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: The date the NDA takes effect.

fields.label: MNDA Term
fields.guidance: How long the agreement itself runs.

variants.label: Expires after a set number of years
Continues until terminated
variants.template: Continues until terminated in accordance with the terms of the MNDA.

fields.label: Term of Confidentiality
fields.guidance: How long confidentiality obligations last after disclosure.

variants.label: A set number of years
variants.template: {years} from the Effective Date, but in the case of trade secrets until Confidential Information is no longer considered a trade secret under applicable laws.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Jurisdiction
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "New Castle County, DE".

fields.label: MNDA Modifications
fields.guidance: Optional free-text modifications to the standard terms; leave unset unless the user asks for changes.

documentTypes.title: Cloud Service Agreement
documentTypes.description: A SaaS/cloud service subscription, covering access and use, support, payment, data privacy, warranties, liability, and termination.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the Framework Terms start.

fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.guidance: The length of the subscription term, e.g. "12 months".

fields.label: Order Date
fields.guidance: The date the Order Form is signed.

fields.label: Non-Renewal Notice Date
fields.guidance: The deadline for giving notice of non-renewal, e.g. "30 days before the end of the current Subscription Period".

fields.label: Technical Support
fields.guidance: A short description of the support the Provider will give, e.g. "Business-hours email support".

fields.label: Use Limitations
fields.guidance: Any usage limits (seats, API calls, storage, etc.). Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Payment Process
fields.guidance: Whether the Customer is invoiced or charged automatically.

fields.label: DPA
fields.guidance: A reference to the parties' Data Processing Agreement, e.g. "the DPA attached as Exhibit A". Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.guidance: Any extra warranties beyond the standard ones. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The overall liability cap, e.g. "the fees paid in the 12 months before the claim" or a fixed dollar amount.

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The higher liability cap that applies to Increased Claims, e.g. "2x the General Cap Amount".

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims get the increased cap, e.g. "breach of confidentiality". Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims are excluded from any liability cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Provider Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Provider will defend the Customer against, e.g. "claims that the Cloud Service infringes intellectual property rights".

fields.label: Customer Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Customer will defend the Provider against, e.g. "claims arising from Customer Content".

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "the state and federal courts located in New Castle County, DE".

documentTypes.title: Design Partner Agreement
documentTypes.description: Grants an early-access design partner use of a product in exchange for feedback that helps develop and improve it.

fields.label: Program
fields.guidance: A short description of the design partner program: what product or features the Partner gets early access to.

fields.label: Term
fields.guidance: How long the agreement runs, e.g. "6 months".

fields.label: Fees
fields.guidance: The fees the Partner pays, e.g. "$0" or "$500 per month".

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the agreement starts.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "the state and federal courts located in New Castle County, DE".

fields.label: Notice Address
fields.guidance: Email or postal address each party uses for legal notices.

documentTypes.title: Service Level Agreement
documentTypes.description: Defines uptime and support response time targets for a cloud service, along with the service credits and remedies available if targets are missed.

fields.label: Target Uptime
fields.guidance: The uptime target as a percentage, e.g. "99.9%".

fields.label: Target Response Time
fields.guidance: How quickly the Provider responds to support requests, e.g. "4 business hours".

fields.label: Support Channel
fields.guidance: How the Customer contacts support, e.g. "email to support@provider.com".

fields.label: Uptime Credit
fields.guidance: The service credit if Target Uptime is missed, e.g. "5% of monthly fees".

fields.label: Response Time Credit
fields.guidance: The service credit if the Target Response Time is missed, e.g. "2% of monthly fees".

fields.label: Scheduled Downtime
fields.guidance: The allowed maintenance window, e.g. "up to 4 hours per month with 48 hours notice".

fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.guidance: The length of the subscription term this SLA covers, e.g. "12 months".

documentTypes.title: Professional Services Agreement
documentTypes.description: Professional services provided under one or more statements of work, covering deliverables, intellectual property, payment, and liability.

fields.label: Deliverables
fields.guidance: What the Provider will deliver under the statement of work.

fields.label: Fees
fields.guidance: What the Customer pays, e.g. "$10,000 fixed fee" or "$150 per hour".

fields.label: Payment Period
fields.guidance: When invoices are due, e.g. "30 days from invoice".

fields.label: SOW Term
fields.guidance: How long the statement of work runs, e.g. "3 months from the SOW effective date".

fields.label: Rejection Period
fields.guidance: How long the Customer has to reject a Deliverable, e.g. "10 business days".

fields.label: Resubmission Period
fields.guidance: How long the Provider has to fix and resubmit a rejected Deliverable, e.g. "10 business days".

fields.label: Customer Obligations
fields.guidance: What the Customer must provide or do so the Provider can perform, e.g. access, staff, materials. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Time of Assignment
fields.guidance: When intellectual property in Deliverables transfers to the Customer, e.g. "upon full payment".

fields.label: Customer Policies
fields.guidance: Any Customer policies the Provider must follow on site or with Customer systems. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: DPA
fields.guidance: A reference to the parties' Data Processing Agreement, e.g. "the DPA attached as Exhibit A". Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Security Policy
fields.guidance: A reference to the Provider's security policy, e.g. "the security policy at provider.com/security". Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Insurance Minimums
fields.guidance: Required insurance coverage, e.g. "$1M general liability". Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.guidance: Any extra warranties beyond the standard ones. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The overall liability cap, e.g. "the fees paid in the 12 months before the claim" or a fixed dollar amount.

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The higher liability cap that applies to Increased Claims, e.g. "2x the General Cap Amount".

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims get the increased cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims are excluded from any liability cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Provider Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Provider will defend the Customer against.

fields.label: Customer Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Customer will defend the Provider against.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "the state and federal courts located in New Castle County, DE".

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the agreement starts.

documentTypes.title: Data Processing Agreement
documentTypes.description: Governs the processing of personal data between a controller/processor and a processor/subprocessor, including international data transfer mechanisms and security incident response.

fields.label: Agreement
fields.guidance: The underlying agreement this DPA supplements, e.g. "the Cloud Service Agreement between the parties dated January 1, 2026".

fields.label: Categories of Personal Data
fields.guidance: The types of personal data processed, e.g. "names, email addresses, usage data".

fields.label: Categories of Data Subjects
fields.guidance: Whose personal data is processed, e.g. "Customer's end users and employees".

fields.label: Special Category Data
fields.guidance: Any GDPR special category data processed (health, biometric, etc.). Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Special Category Data Restrictions or Safeguards
fields.guidance: Restrictions or safeguards applied to special category data. Leave unset if not applicable.
spanLabels: Special Category Data Restrictions or Safeguards

fields.label: Frequency of Transfer
fields.guidance: How often data is transferred, e.g. "continuous".

fields.label: Nature and Purpose of Processing
fields.guidance: What the processing does and why, e.g. "hosting and providing the cloud service".

fields.label: Duration of Processing
fields.guidance: How long processing continues, e.g. "the term of the Agreement".

fields.label: Approved Subprocessors
fields.guidance: The approved subprocessors, or where the list is published, e.g. "listed at provider.com/subprocessors".

fields.label: Governing Member State
fields.guidance: The EU member state whose law governs the Standard Contractual Clauses, e.g. "Ireland".

fields.label: Security Policy
fields.guidance: A reference to the Provider's security policy, e.g. "the security policy at provider.com/security".

fields.label: Provider Security Contact
fields.guidance: Who to contact about security incidents, e.g. "security@provider.com".

documentTypes.title: Software License Agreement
documentTypes.description: Licenses on-premises or installed software, covering license grants, restrictions, updates, warranties, and liability.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the Framework Terms start.

fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.guidance: The length of the license subscription, e.g. "12 months".

fields.label: Permitted Uses
fields.guidance: What the Customer may use the software for, e.g. "internal business purposes".

fields.label: License Limits
fields.guidance: Any limits on the license (seats, installations, environments). Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Payment Process
fields.guidance: Whether the Customer is invoiced or charged automatically.

fields.label: Order Date
fields.guidance: The date the Order Form is signed.

fields.label: Non-Renewal Notice Date
fields.guidance: The deadline for giving notice of non-renewal, e.g. "30 days before the end of the current Subscription Period".

fields.label: Warranty Period
fields.guidance: How long the software warranty lasts, e.g. "90 days from delivery".

fields.label: Deletion Procedure
fields.guidance: How the Customer must delete or return the software after termination, e.g. "delete all copies and certify deletion in writing".

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.guidance: Any extra warranties beyond the standard ones. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The overall liability cap, e.g. "the fees paid in the 12 months before the claim" or a fixed dollar amount.

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The higher liability cap that applies to Increased Claims, e.g. "2x the General Cap Amount".

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims get the increased cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims are excluded from any liability cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Provider Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Provider will defend the Customer against.

fields.label: Customer Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Customer will defend the Provider against.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "the state and federal courts located in New Castle County, DE".

documentTypes.title: Partnership Agreement
documentTypes.description: A business partnership arrangement between two companies, including trademark licensing, fees, and confidentiality.

fields.label: Obligations
fields.guidance: What each party will do in the partnership.

fields.label: Payment Process
fields.guidance: How payments between the parties are made, e.g. "invoiced monthly, due in 30 days".

fields.label: Payment Schedule
fields.guidance: When payments happen, e.g. "monthly" or "quarterly".

fields.label: Territory
fields.guidance: The geographic scope of the partnership, e.g. "the United States".

fields.label: End Date
fields.guidance: When the partnership ends.

fields.label: Brand Guidelines
fields.guidance: A reference to each party's brand or trademark usage guidelines. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: DPA
fields.guidance: A reference to the parties' Data Processing Agreement, e.g. "the DPA attached as Exhibit A". Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the agreement starts.

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.guidance: Any extra warranties beyond the standard ones. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The overall liability cap, e.g. "the fees paid in the 12 months before the claim" or a fixed dollar amount.

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The higher liability cap that applies to Increased Claims, e.g. "2x the General Cap Amount".

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims get the increased cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.guidance: Which categories of claims are excluded from any liability cap. Leave unset if none.

fields.label: Company Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Company will defend the Partner against.

fields.label: Partner Covered Claims
fields.guidance: The third-party claims the Partner will defend the Company against.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "the state and federal courts located in New Castle County, DE".

documentTypes.title: Pilot Agreement
documentTypes.description: A time-limited trial or evaluation of a product before entering into a longer-term definitive agreement.

fields.label: Pilot Period
fields.guidance: How long the pilot runs, e.g. "60 days".

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the pilot starts.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.guidance: The overall liability cap, e.g. "the fees paid under this agreement" or a fixed dollar amount.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.guidance: The US state whose law governs, e.g. "Delaware".

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.guidance: Where disputes are heard, e.g. "the state and federal courts located in New Castle County, DE".

fields.label: Notice Address
fields.guidance: Email or postal address each party uses for legal notices.

documentTypes.title: Business Associate Agreement
documentTypes.description: Required under HIPAA, governing a business associate's use and protection of protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

fields.label: Agreement
fields.guidance: The underlying services agreement this BAA supplements, e.g. "the Cloud Service Agreement between the parties dated January 1, 2026".

fields.label: BAA Effective Date
fields.guidance: When the BAA takes effect.

fields.label: Breach Notification Period
fields.guidance: How quickly the Provider must report a breach of PHI, e.g. "5 business days".

fields.label: Limitations
fields.guidance: Any limitations on how the Provider may use or disclose PHI. Leave unset if none.

documentTypes.title: AI Addendum
documentTypes.description: Supplements a product agreement to govern the use of AI/ML features, including input/output ownership, model training restrictions, and AI-specific disclaimers.

fields.label: Training Data
fields.guidance: What Customer data (if any) the Provider may use to train AI models. Leave unset if training is not permitted.

fields.label: Training Purposes
fields.guidance: Why the Provider may train on that data. Leave unset if training is not permitted.

fields.label: Training Restrictions
fields.guidance: Any restrictions on the permitted training, e.g. "data must be aggregated and de-identified".

fields.label: Improvement Restrictions
fields.guidance: Restrictions on using Customer inputs/outputs for product improvement outside training.
